audit_items.proof_trace: The sole free site is HelloTypeReleaseObject, which saves `next = cur->next` before `RedisModule_Free(cur)` on every iteration, then frees the object wrapper last — no pointer is dereferenced after being freed. Each node and the object are freed exactly once; Redis's module framework invokes HelloTypeFree exactly once per key lifetime, precluding any double-free. No other function in the file calls RedisModule_Free on these pointers.
